chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 986 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case (Order sent to AAG) 10.07.2018 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondents 3 to 5..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Statement is filed on behalf of respondents 3, 4 and 5 / Sukkur Municipal Corporation, in which it is mentioned that answering respondents have cleared the dues of the Financial Assistance of the petitioner vide cheque No.23928941 dated 28.06.2018. Now, the petitioner is getting pension regularly. In the view of above development, counsel for the petitioner doesn’t press the instant petition more, which is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
